{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017080672BBB521FE6F4A886DAF"}"},"total":686},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7336578335840027417","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书的整体质量还是不错的，在番茄来说是可以的了。毕竟是免费的，有时候也不要要求太高，偶尔出一些错或者加点个人喜好也正常"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708181515,"group_id":"7320811641241603134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/XQDhuMgK8fWpUPR71anxI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531405&x-signature=CBwRrprj%2BL33fT06lI8aSpnKuhg%3D","user_id":"97127169929","user_name":"爱吃酸菜蟹煲的道王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"97127169929","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7320811641241603134","book_info":{"abstract":"【视频剪辑+万朝直播+华夏历史】
苏治只是一个普通的短视频制作者，直到有一天他点进了一个小网站。
只要在该网站发布的视频，就能被平行世界里各个朝代的人物所看到。
他不仅可以获得点赞奖励，还能得到大哥们的打赏。
半信半疑的苏治，发出了自己精心制作的《盘点历史十大杰出帝王》
于是，皇帝们轰动了。
秦始皇：朕灭六国，一统华夏！第一名，不为过吧？
汉武帝：朕扫平匈奴，建汉家脊梁，前三名，应该有吧？
李世民：朕文治武功，打得周围番邦磕头求饶，不是第一，也肯定是第二！
朱元璋：咱驱逐蒙元，再造神州，就问你准备怎么排？
《盘点历史十大杰出帝王》之后，
还有《盘点历史十大昏庸帝王》，
《十大杰出统帅》
《十大红颜祸水》
只有你想不到，没有苏治排不了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5de51555d68de4242d7ce06bbfdbf750","author":"权照","author_id":"","book_id":"7320811641241603134","book_name":"开局揭秘十大杰出皇帝万界跪了","book_short_name":"万朝历史排行","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7320811730601263678","read_count":"10152","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1024256"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"462","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,直播,皇帝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7a06b3237797fd129e8d3e6c437187a8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181686&x-signature=wABxCjKJDHNOtrgfmDcP9pOds%2BA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1820443740218718","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"108"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017080672BBB521FE6F4A886DAF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21928,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":49697},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7357947784877949721","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得挺好的，至少风格是我喜欢的，让人看得时候不会觉得枯燥乏味。
虽然内容不完全保真，但有些内容却保野，只能说如果纠察野史的话，可能看不下去，但忽略野史的话，还是挺有意思的。
我就喜欢这种排名后发奖励的，因为这样能帮助到古代先贤们，让他们少走弯路，避免大灾大难的降临，这就是我所希望的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713157531,"group_id":"7320811641241603134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"畅游在文字的海洋，邂逅着主角们精彩的人生。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7c9BQfHYNVoS/D2ryZf7Gr9VzXFdg0P9xRTO+bHwtXn","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/822a6e861d7a4364953ba59e98e6008f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528336&x-signature=fekVnr9yWuF1Pk5N7anvvCW%2F9JQ%3D","user_id":"3136237883636711","user_name":"又是一季柳絮飞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3136237883636711","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1710286868,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7320811641241603134","book_info":{"abstract":"【视频剪辑+万朝直播+华夏历史】
